body:
## Summary

Change two disk-gate **defaults in code** so the bot stops launching tasks before the host fills up:

1. **`HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD` default `0.9` ‚Üí `0.8`** (block at 80% used instead of 90%).
2. **`HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB` default `2048` ‚Üí `10240`** (require ‚â•10 GB free to start a task, instead of 2 GB).

Both knobs **already exist** ‚Äî this issue only asks to change their built-in defaults to safer values. (An earlier revision of this issue proposed adding a *new* `HIVE_MIND_MIN_FREE_DISK_GB` var; that was a mistake ‚Äî `HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB` already provides the absolute free-space gate, in MB. No new var is needed.)

### Motivation

On a real deployment the disk filled to ~96‚Äì100% and **isolated tasks died because resources were exhausted** (`/dev/sda1 96G, 4.1G free, 96%`). The current defaults are too permissive:
- 90% used on a ~96 GB disk only blocks with ~9.6 GB free ‚Äî too little headroom once several multi-GB isolation tasks are mid-build (Rust `target/`, `node_modules/onnxruntime`+CUDA, cloned repos).
- The absolute floor of 2 GB is far too low for docker-isolation tasks that each need many GB.

These two defaults are what we set locally via `.lenv` to stop the bleeding (`HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD: 0.8`, `HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB: 10240`); this issue asks to make those the shipped defaults so every deployment is protected without per-host overrides.

## Change 1 ‚Äî `HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD` default `0.9` ‚Üí `0.8`

Set in `src/queue-config.lib.mjs`, in **two** places that must change in lockstep:

`src/queue-config.lib.mjs:252` (primary `thresholds.disk`):
```js
disk: getThresholdConfig('disk', 'HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD', 'HIVE_MIND_DISK_STRATEGY', 0.9, 'reject'),
```
`src/queue-config.lib.mjs:268` (legacy flat alias):
```js
DISK_THRESHOLD: getThresholdConfig('disk', 'HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD', 'HIVE_MIND_DISK_STRATEGY', 0.9, 'reject').value,
```
‚Üí change both `0.9` to `0.8`.

This default also drives the display marker: `DISPLAY_THRESHOLDS.DISK = thresholdToPercent(QUEUE_CONFIG.DISK_THRESHOLD)` (`src/queue-config.lib.mjs:311`), used by the `/limits` "Disk space ‚Ä¶ ‚ö†Ô∏è" bar (`src/limits.lib.mjs:1037-1042`). So changing the default to `0.8` moves both the launch-blocking decision **and** the ‚ö†Ô∏è warning marker to 80%, in lockstep. (The `HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD` env var and the LINO `HIVE_MIND_QUEUE_CONFIG` still override the default ‚Äî this only changes the built-in fallback.)

It is a float ratio (0‚Äì1), so the default literal is `0.8` (not `80`).

## Change 2 ‚Äî `HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB` default `2048` ‚Üí `10240`

Set in `src/config.lib.mjs:114`:
```js
export const systemLimits = {
  minDiskSpaceMb: parseIntWithDefault('HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB', 2048),
  ...
};
```
‚Üí change `2048` to `10240` (10 GB, in MB ‚Äî units confirmed by `docs/CONFIGURATION.md:82`: "Minimum required disk space in MB"). This gate is consumed by the task-start path (`src/memory-check.mjs`, `src/hive.mjs`).

Remember to update the documented default in `docs/CONFIGURATION.md` (and the localized `CONFIGURATION.{hi,zh,ru}.md`) from 2048 ‚Üí 10240, and any `coolify/.env.example` reference.

## Resulting defaults

| Var | Old default | New default | Units | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD` | 0.9 | **0.8** | float ratio 0‚Äì1 | block when usage ‚â• this |
| `HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB` | 2048 | **10240** | MB | block unless ‚â• this much free |

A task is blocked if **either** gate trips (‚â•80% used **or** <10 GB free). On large disks the GB floor bites first; on small disks the percentage does ‚Äî both are protective.

## Citations
- `src/queue-config.lib.mjs:252, :268` ‚Äî disk threshold default `0.9` ‚Üí `0.8`; `:298,:311` display derivation.
- `src/config.lib.mjs:114` ‚Äî `minDiskSpaceMb` default `2048` ‚Üí `10240`; consumed by `src/memory-check.mjs`, `src/hive.mjs`.
- `docs/CONFIGURATION.md:82` ‚Äî documented default (update to 10240); localized copies `CONFIGURATION.{hi,zh,ru}.md`.
- `src/limits.lib.mjs:549` `getDiskSpaceInfo` (returns `availableMB`/`availableBytes`/`freePercentage`); `:1037-1042` disk display bar + ‚ö†Ô∏è.
- `src/telegram-solve-queue.lib.mjs:801-826` ‚Äî the percentage admission gate (uses `HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD`).

## Related
- #1979 (auto-reap finished task containers) and #1980 (make `hive-cleanup` docker-aware) ‚Äî those reclaim space; this prevents launching into an already-full disk. Complementary: reaping reduces how often the gate trips; the gate is the backstop when it would still overflow.
- Upstream `link-foundation/start#140` (container removal default).
title: Disk gate: change defaults ‚Äî HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD 0.9‚Üí0.8 and HIVE_MIND_MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB 2048‚Üí10240 (10 GB)
